<<transforming json to python dictionary>>

SECTION 1
The JSON data provided contains three key fields: name, age, and city. These fields are structured as strings and integers respectively. The task is to convert this JSON into a Python dictionary.

SECTION 2
The Python dictionary will map each JSON field to its corresponding Python value. The name "John" is mapped to the string "John", the age 30 is mapped to the integer 30, and the city "New York" is mapped to the string "New York". The final dictionary is as follows:

{
    "name": "John",
    "age": 30,
    "city": "New York"
}
